author: HulioVRD
text:
**Describe the bug**  
Using 'ocrmypdf.extra\_plugins.awslambda' plugin is causing an error locally. Same thing is happening on lambda. It looks like progress bar update method is causing this problem

**To Reproduce**

```
ocrmypdf.ocr(inputname, outputname, deskew=True, skip_text=True, use_threads=True,
                     jobs=1, progress_bar=False, plugins=['ocrmypdf.extra_plugins.awslambda'])
```

**Expected behavior**  
File should be processed

**Screenshots**

```
{
  "errorMessage": "update() missing 1 required positional argument: 'self'",
  "errorType": "TypeError",
  "stackTrace": [
    "  File \"/var/task/app.py\", line 59, in handler\n    raise e\n",
    "  File \"/var/task/app.py\", line 47, in handler\n    ocrmypdf.ocr(inputname, outputname, deskew=True, skip_text=True, use_threads=True, jobs=1, progress_bar=False, plugins=['ocrmypdf.extra_plugins.awslambda'])\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/api.py\", line 340, in ocr\n    return run_pipeline(options=options, plugin_manager=plugin_manager, api=True)\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/_sync.py\", line 359, in run_pipeline\n    pdfinfo = get_pdfinfo(\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/_pipeline.py\", line 157, in get_pdfinfo\n    return PdfInfo(\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/pdfinfo/info.py\", line 856, in __init__\n    self._pages = _pdf_pageinfo_concurrent(\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/pdfinfo/info.py\", line 642, in _pdf_pageinfo_concurrent\n    executor(\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/_concurrent.py\", line 82, in __call__\n    self._execute(\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/extra_plugins/awslambda.py\", line 99, in _execute\n    task_finished(result, self.pbar_class)\n",
    "  File \"/var/lang/lib/python3.8/site-packages/ocrmypdf/pdfinfo/info.py\", line 619, in update_pageinfo\n    pbar.update()\n"
  ]
}
```

**System (please complete the following information):**

* OS: macOS 10.14.6
* Python version: 3.8
* OCRmyPDF version: 12.0.0b1
* leptonica-1.80
* tesseract 4.1.1

**Installation**  
OCRmyPDF is installed using PIP on amazon/aws-lambda-python:3.8 image.

author: HulioVRD
text:
Looks like class is passed instead of instance of progress bar, and then it's trying to use method on class

<https://github.com/jbarlow83/OCRmyPDF/blob/a861c58da2f02cf71176aaa1b9774bbf0f9f634a/src/ocrmypdf/extra_plugins/awslambda.py#L96-L100>

<https://github.com/jbarlow83/OCRmyPDF/blob/a861c58da2f02cf71176aaa1b9774bbf0f9f634a/src/ocrmypdf/pdfinfo/info.py#L619>
